hypothesis: If an autonomous materials discovery agent in MADE uses a pretrained structure generator (MatterGen) together with a diversity-based acquisition policy, then within a 20-query budget it will discover more novelty-checked ε≤0.01 eV/atom-stable compounds in both Na–O and Co–Nb–Sn than an agent using random generation and random acquisition, because learned structural priors combined with composition-space diversity improve exploration efficiency.
